facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Locals don't. Golden Foot Massage Phú Quốc has a 4.9-star rating from 452 reviews and zero hype on the tourist trail. Foot massage, full body, deep tissue. Right on the main strip, zero wait most mornings. Your legs will thank you after a full beach day. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
